Class UserDaoImpl

java.lang.Object
com.aptcoursework.dao.UserDaoImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
UserDao
public class UserDaoImpl extends Object implements UserDao
Implementation of the UserDao interface.

This class handles all database operations related to the User entity. It provides concrete implementations for user-related functionalities such as inserting new users, retrieving user details by username or email, and fetching usernames using user ID.

The class uses JDBC for database interaction and relies on the DatabaseConnection utility class to establish and close connections. All SQL operations are executed using prepared statements to ensure security and prevent SQL injection.

This class acts as the Data Access Layer (DAL) for user management, separating database logic from business logic.

Author:
Heaven Gurung, Sugam Rana Magar

  • Method Details

    • updateLastLogin

      public void updateLastLogin(int userID)
      Specified by:
      updateLastLogin in interface UserDao

    • updateUserProfile

      public boolean updateUserProfile(User user)
      Specified by:
      updateUserProfile in interface UserDao

    • insertUser

      public boolean insertUser(User user)
      Inserts a new user into the database.

      This method adds a new record into the users table using the details provided in the User object, including username, email, password hash, and role.

      If the insertion is successful, the method returns true. If an SQL exception occurs during execution, the error is logged and the method returns false.

      Specified by:
      insertUser in interface UserDao
      Parameters:
      user - the User object containing user details to be inserted
      Returns:
      true if the user is successfully added; false if an error occurs

    • insertImgProfilePath

      public boolean insertImgProfilePath(String path, int userID)
      Specified by:
      insertImgProfilePath in interface UserDao

    • findByUsername

      public User findByUsername(String username)
      Finds a user in the database by username (case-insensitive).

      This method executes a SQL query to retrieve a user record from the users table where the username matches the provided value, ignoring case differences using LOWER() function.

      If a matching user is found, a User object is created and populated with the retrieved data, including user ID, username, email, password hash, and role. If the role value is invalid or missing, it defaults to Role.CUSTOMER.

      If no matching record is found or an SQL exception occurs, the method returns null.

      Specified by:
      findByUsername in interface UserDao
      Parameters:
      username - the username to search for
      Returns:
      a User object if found; otherwise null

    • findByEmail

      public User findByEmail(String email)
      Finds a user in the database by email address (case-insensitive).

      This method executes a SQL query to retrieve a user record from the users table where the email matches the provided value, ignoring case differences using the LOWER() function.

      If a matching user is found, a User object is created and populated with the retrieved data, including username, email, password hash, and role. If the role value is invalid or missing, it defaults to Role.CUSTOMER.

      If no matching record is found or an SQL exception occurs, the method returns null.

      Specified by:
      findByEmail in interface UserDao
      Parameters:
      email - the email address to search for
      Returns:
      a User object if found; otherwise null

    • usernameByUserID

      public String usernameByUserID(int userID)
      Retrieves the username associated with a given user ID.

      This method executes a SQL query on the users table to find the record matching the provided userID. If a matching record is found, the corresponding username is returned.

      If no user is found or an SQL exception occurs, the method returns null.

      Specified by:
      usernameByUserID in interface UserDao
      Parameters:
      userID - the unique identifier of the user
      Returns:
      the username of the user if found; otherwise null

    • findByUserID

      public User findByUserID(int userID)
      Retrieves a User from the database using the user's ID.
      Specified by:
      findByUserID in interface UserDao
      Parameters:
      userID - the unique ID of the user
      Returns:
      the matching User object, or null if not found

    • findAllUsers

      public ArrayList<User> findAllUsers()
      Retrieves all users from the database.
      Specified by:
      findAllUsers in interface UserDao
      Returns:
      an ArrayList containing all User objects, or null if an error occurs

    • deleteUserByID

      public boolean deleteUserByID(int userID)
      Deletes a user from the database using the user's ID.
      Specified by:
      deleteUserByID in interface UserDao
      Parameters:
      userID - the unique ID of the user to delete
      Returns:
      true if the user was successfully deleted, otherwise false

    • countAllCustomers

      public int countAllCustomers()
      Counts the total number of users with the CUSTOMER role.
      Specified by:
      countAllCustomers in interface UserDao
      Returns:
      the total number of customers, or 0 if an error occurs
